DSA Patterns

Appearance

DSA PatternsZero → Interview Ready

12 core patterns. Every problem solved. JavaScript & Java side-by-side.

Start with the Framework →
Browse All Patterns
🧠

5-Step Framework

A battle-tested process for approaching any DSA problem — before writing a single line of code.

👉

Two Pointers

Sorted arrays, pair-finding, and partitioning. Turns O(n²) nested loops into O(n) single pass.

🪟

Sliding Window

Contiguous subarrays, substrings, and range problems. Expand right, shrink left.

🔍

Binary Search

Not just sorted arrays — any monotonic decision space. The template that works everywhere.

🌊

BFS

Shortest paths, level-order traversal, spreading problems. Queue-based, level by level.

🌲

DFS & Backtracking

Explore all paths, generate combinations/permutations, solve constraint problems.

🎯

Dynamic Programming

Overlapping subproblems, optimal substructure. The hardest pattern — highest interview ROI.

🗂️

HashMap & HashSet

O(1) lookups, frequency counting, complement-finding. The pattern behind Two Sum.

➕

Prefix Sum

Range sum queries and subarray sum problems solved in O(1) after O(n) preprocessing.

📚

Monotonic Stack

Next greater/smaller element, histogram problems, temperature spans.

⛰️

Heap / Top-K

Kth largest, streaming top-K, merge K sorted lists. Priority queue mastery.

🐢

Fast & Slow Pointer

Cycle detection, finding midpoints, and linked list manipulation without extra space.

🔀

Merge Intervals

Overlapping ranges, scheduling, and calendar problems. Sort first, then merge.

Built for interview prep. JavaScript & Java.
